description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows on several sides allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front features a driveway leading to an attached garage, landscaped with shrubs and a tree, and a small garden area with red flowers. The interior is open-plan, with visible living, dining, and kitchen spaces, as well as multiple bedrooms and bathrooms. The rear of the bungalow opens to a patio area, and the overall design emphasizes simplicity and functionality. The structure is surrounded by paved and landscaped areas, blending seamlessly into a suburban or urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, attached garage, and landscaped front and rear areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, landscaped garden, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the tree, patio area, and rear windows, with less visibility of the garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open-plan living area, large windows, and the tree on the left side.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the rear patio, side windows, and the driveway extending to the back.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple sides
